TH_SANAE-SANAE_CHARACTER.cardsModifierDe: Sanae Kochiya's cards now appear in rewards and shops.
TH_SANAE-SANAE_CHARACTER.description:
The wind priestess of Moriya Shrine, possessing the ability to create miracles.
Fights by spreading faith and manipulating wind.
TH_SANAE-SANAE_CHARACTER.title: Sanae Kochiya
TH_SANAE-SANAE_CHARACTER.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
